layout.global: h-screen w-screen overflow-hidden flex bg-[#09090B] text-slate-200 font-sans
layout.sidebar: w-[260px] h-full border-r border-white/5 flex flex-col bg-[#09090B] transition-all duration-300
layout.mainArea: flex-1 flex flex-col h-full relative overflow-hidden bg-[#09090B]
layout.chatContainer: flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-4 md:px-8 py-8 custom-scrollbar
layout.composerContainer: p-4 w-full max-w-4xl mx-auto shrink-0 relative bg-transparent
layout.suggestionCardsGrid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4 w-full max-w-4xl mx-auto mt-8

components.composer: bg-[#121214] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3 shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] focus-within:border-white/20 transition-all
components.suggestionCard: bg-[#121214] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 hover:bg-[#18181B] hover:border-white/20 transition-all cursor-pointer group flex flex-col gap-3 h-full hover:-translate-y-1
components.messageUser: bg-[#18181B] border border-white/5 text-slate-200 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 max-w-[80%] self-end
components.messageAI: bg-transparent text-slate-200 p-4 max-w-[90%] self-start flex gap-4
components.workingContextStrip: h-12 w-full bg-[#121214]/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5 flex items-center justify-between px-4 text-xs text-white/50 sticky top-0 z-40
components.profilePopover: bg-[#121214] border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-2xl p-4 w-64 backdrop-blur-xl

visualEnhancers.shadows: Ambient diffuse shadows for depth, no harsh drop shadows. shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.6)] for popovers.
visualEnhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly for sticky elements (WCW Strip): bg-[#09090B]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5

image_urls.description: Default user avatar for the bottom-left profile area

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a viewport-locked shell (`h-screen w-screen overflow-hidden flex`).
Implement a collapsible left sidebar (default 260px, collapsed 72px). It should house the Thread List and the bottom-left account area.
The account area triggers a Profile Popover (not always visible, use Radix/Shadcn Popover component).
Main area is a vertical flex container. The chat session view is the scrollable region.

Implement a Welcome Hero State with Feature Carousel Cards (suggestion cards) in the center. These should disappear once a chat session is active (i.e. once the user starts typing or sends a message).
The Bottom Composer must be full-width within its max-width container, pinned to the bottom of the main chat area.
Implement a Persistent Model Bar either integrated into the Composer or just above it.
Implement a Working Context Strip (WCW metering) at the top of the main chat area to show live memory usage.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="sidebar-toggle"`, `data-testid="composer-input"`).
Use Phosphor Icons (or Lucide React) for crisp, high-end icons. Do not use generic thick icons.
Use purely `.js` and `.jsx` files as requested (no TS/TSX).
Keep files under 400 lines by splitting components aggressively.
Stick to the dark mode palette strictly (background #09090B, surface #121214).
No gradients or vibrant colors, except for subtle white accents.
Implement components in `frontend/src/components` matching CAOS functionalities (memory architecture, deterministic reinjection tracking, context window size).
